8. Hemophilia clotting factors. Blood clotting factors for hemophilia patients 
competent to use such factors to control bleeding without medical or other 
supervision and items related to the administration of such factors are covered 
under Part B. 

9. Pneumococcal and influenza vaccines. See Pub 100-02, Medicare Benefit Policy
